message:
test(bd-9chy.47): add comprehensive fopen/fdopen test suite

Add 17 new tests for fopen/fdopen covering:
- Mode parsing: r, w, a, r+, w+, a+, binary (b), exclusive (x), cloexec (e)
- Bad modes returning NULL with EINVAL
- errno preservation on success and failure
- fd lifecycle: fresh fd >= 3, fclose closes fd
- fdopen: valid fd, invalid fd (-1 returns EBADF), mode mismatch

Part of bd-9chy.47 test suite (17 of 26 tests implemented).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
